news.title: Delta, American raise revenue guidance, citing growth in demand

news.title: Oil pares gains as doubts linger over U.S.-backed plan to protect Strait of Hormuz shipping
news.summary: Oil prices pared gains on Tuesday as uncertainty lingers over a U.S.-led coalition to protect shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Senators tell ByteDance to 'immediately shut down' Seedance AI video app

news.summary: The average used car now costs around $26,000. Here’s how I bought a Lexus for $8,000 and how I paid for it.

news.title: A man used ChatGPT to cure his dog. Here are the stocks for the new age of programmable medicine.
news.summary: The age of programmable medicine may be upon us, says Dr. Andrew Weisman. Weisman: "I think we're in the early stages of a new era of medicine"

news.summary: The Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed to oil-tanker traffic. The U.S. now produces about as much oil and natural gas as it consumes.

news.summary: The YouTuber’s new fintech venture relies on Evolve Bank & Trust, a partner bank of the now-collapsed Synapse that has dealt with numerous setbacks.
